tasks.title: Create HTML scaffold with semantic structure
tasks.description: Build the foundational index.html file with proper document structure, meta tags, Google Fonts link for Orbitron, and semantic containers for title, pad grid, and legend
tasks.details:
Create `index.html` at project root with: - HTML5 doctype and semantic structure - `` with charset UTF-8, viewport meta for responsive design, title "VERY VERY COOL DEMO" - Google Fonts link: `` - Links to `style.css` and `script.js` - `` structure: - `

VERY VERY COOL DEMO

` - `
` containing `
` with 16 `
tasks.testStrategy: Open index.html in browser and verify: (1) all 16 pads render in 4x4 layout, (2) title and legend are visible, (3) Orbitron font loads (check dev tools Network tab), (4) document structure is semantic and accessible

tasks.title: Assign per-pad neon colors matching MPC reference
tasks.description: Define 16 unique CSS custom properties (CSS variables) for pad border colors that precisely match the cyan, magenta, blue, and yellow neon colors distributed across the MPC Live III reference image
tasks.details:
In `style.css`, create CSS custom properties in `:root` for each of the 16 pads, matching the color distribution from `src/images/pads.jpg`:

Based on the reference image analysis:
- Row 1: cyan (#00f0ff), magenta (#ff00aa), blue (#0080ff), yellow/orange (#ffaa00)
- Row 2: cyan (#00f0ff), yellow/orange (#ffaa00), magenta (#ff00aa), cyan (#00f0ff)
- Row 3: magenta (#ff00aa), cyan (#00f0ff), yellow/orange (#ffaa00), blue (#0080ff)
- Row 4: magenta (#ff00aa), blue (#0080ff), magenta (#ff00aa), yellow/orange (#ffaa00)

Define variables:
```css
:root {
  --color-1: #00f0ff; /* cyan */
  --color-2: #ff00aa; /* magenta */
  --color-3: #0080ff; /* blue */
  --color-4: #ffaa00; /* yellow/orange */
  --color-Q: #00f0ff; /* cyan */
  --color-W: #ffaa00; /* yellow/orange */
  --color-E: #ff00aa; /* magenta */
  --color-R: #00f0ff; /* cyan */
  --color-A: #ff00aa; /* magenta */
  --color-S: #00f0ff; /* cyan */
  --color-D: #ffaa00; /* yellow/orange */
  --color-F: #0080ff; /* blue */
  --color-Z: #ff00aa; /* magenta */
  --color-X: #0080ff; /* blue */
  --color-C: #ff00aa; /* magenta */
  --color-V: #ffaa00; /* yellow/orange */
}
```

Apply colors using attribute selectors:
`.pad[data-key="1"] { --pad-color: var(--color-1); }` (repeat for all 16 keys)
tasks.testStrategy: Inspect each pad in browser dev tools and verify its --pad-color CSS variable matches the reference image color for that position. Visually compare side-by-side with pads.jpg

tasks.title: Implement base CSS styling and dark synthwave theme
tasks.description: Create the complete visual foundation: dark background, centered column layout, responsive sizing with vmin units, and base pad styling with rounded squares and neon borders
tasks.testStrategy: Verify: (1) dark background renders, (2) pads display in 4x4 grid with correct spacing, (3) each pad shows its assigned neon border color with dim glow, (4) layout scales proportionally on viewport resize down to 360px, (5) grid maintains square aspect ratio

tasks.title: Style title with cyan neon glow and Orbitron font
tasks.description: Apply layered text-shadow effects to create authentic neon-sign glow on the title, with Orbitron bold typography and optional subtle flicker animation
tasks.testStrategy: Verify: (1) title displays with Orbitron font at large size, (2) cyan neon glow is visible and has appropriate halo intensity, (3) subtle flicker animation plays smoothly without being distracting, (4) text remains legible on dark background, (5) title scales down proportionally on mobile

tasks.title: Style legend with keycap graphics and hint text
tasks.description: Create visual keymap using styled keycap elements arranged in 4x4 grid below the pads, with subtle styling and instructional hint text
tasks.testStrategy: Verify: (1) legend appears below pad grid, (2) hint text is legible and subtle, (3) 16 keycaps render in 4x4 layout matching pad key arrangement, (4) keycaps have subtle 3D appearance suggesting physical keys, (5) legend doesn't compete visually with pads

tasks.title: Implement pressed-state CSS animation with glow and scale
tasks.description: Create .pad-pressed CSS class that triggers instant full-brightness neon flash with halo glow and slight scale-down, with 250ms fade-out transition on release
tasks.testStrategy: Temporarily add .pad-pressed class to a pad in dev tools and verify: (1) pad instantly fills with its neon color, (2) halo glow appears around pad border, (3) pad scales down to 98%, (4) text color inverts to black for readability, (5) removing class triggers smooth 250ms fade back to resting state

tasks.title: Preload all 16 audio files on page initialization
tasks.description: Create audio loading system in script.js that eagerly preloads all .wav files from src/sounds/ into memory, mapped by key name, ready for instant playback
tasks.testStrategy: Open browser dev tools Network tab and verify: (1) all 16 .wav files load on page initialization before any interaction, (2) files are fetched once and cached, (3) no console errors appear, (4) page remains responsive during load. Test with slow 3G throttling to confirm preload behavior.

tasks.title: Implement keyboard event handlers with repeat filtering
tasks.description: Wire up keydown and keyup listeners that map keyboard input to pads, ignore OS key-repeat events, trigger sound playback and visual press state, and handle release state
tasks.testStrategy: Test keyboard interaction: (1) press and release each of the 16 keys - verify sound plays and pad flashes, (2) hold a key - verify pad stays lit and sound plays only once, (3) rapidly tap a key 10 times - verify overlapping sounds and responsive visual feedback, (4) press multiple keys simultaneously - verify each pad responds independently, (5) Cmd-Tab away and back - verify no pads remain stuck in pressed state, (6) press an unmapped key like Space - verify no errors or side effects

tasks.title: Implement mouse and touch event handlers for pad clicks
tasks.description: Add pointer event listeners (mousedown, mouseup, mouseleave, touchstart, touchend) to each pad button that mirror keyboard press/release behavior
tasks.testStrategy: Test pointer interaction: (1) click each pad with mouse - verify sound plays and visual flash occurs, (2) click and hold a pad, then drag mouse off - verify pad releases when cursor leaves, (3) tap each pad on touch device - verify touch works identically to click, (4) rapidly tap a single pad 10 times - verify overlapping sounds and responsive animation, (5) multi-touch: press multiple pads simultaneously on touch device - verify each responds independently, (6) verify no double-triggering on touch devices (no ghost clicks)

tasks.title: Cross-browser testing and performance validation
tasks.description: Test the complete application across target browsers (Chrome, Safari, Firefox, Edge) on desktop and mobile, validate performance metrics (audio latency <50ms, no animation jank), and verify all requirements are met
tasks.details:
Comprehensive testing checklist:

**Functional testing:**
- Test all 16 pads via keyboard on Chrome, Safari, Firefox, Edge (desktop)
- Test all 16 pads via click on all desktop browsers
- Test all 16 pads via touch on Safari iOS and Chrome Android
- Verify drum-roll test: mash single key ~10 times/sec, confirm overlapping sounds with no dropouts
- Verify multi-press: hold 3+ keys simultaneously, confirm independent pad behavior
- Verify autoplay policy: first keypress/click enables audio without explicit prompt
- Verify window blur: Cmd-Tab away mid-press, confirm pads release

**Visual testing:**
- Compare rendered pad colors against `src/images/pads.jpg` reference - confirm mosaic matches
- Verify title cyan neon glow renders correctly with visible halo
- Verify smooth 250ms fade transition when releasing pads
- Test responsive scaling: resize viewport from 1920px down to 360px, confirm proportional scaling
- Confirm dark synthwave aesthetic matches design intent

**Performance testing:**
- Measure perceived audio latency (first press to audible sound) - should be <50ms
- Test sustained 10-press/sec drum roll - monitor Chrome DevTools Performance tab for dropped frames
- Verify no memory leaks during 60-second continuous mashing session
- Confirm page load time <2sec on broadband (local file:// or localhost)

**Accessibility testing:**
- Tab through pads with keyboard - verify focus indicators are visible
- Test with VoiceOver/NVDA - verify pads announce their key labels

**Edge cases:**
- Test with Google Fonts blocked - verify fallback to system sans-serif
- Test offline - verify app works (if fonts cached) or degrades gracefully
- Test on weak hardware (older phone) - confirm acceptable performance
tasks.testStrategy: Create testing matrix spreadsheet with browsers/devices as columns and test cases as rows. Mark each cell pass/fail. Success criteria: all P0 requirements pass on all target browsers, P1 requirements pass on modern Chrome/Safari. Document any issues found, file as bugs if critical or defer if polish. Final gate: owner subjectively rates page as "looks cool and feels right" during hands-on demo run-through.
